configurations.name: Android: Start Tablet Emulator (emulator-5556)
configurations.command: TABLET_AVD=${TABLET_AVD:-Medium_Tablet_API_36.1}; if ! ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/emulator/emulator -list-avds | grep -qx "$TABLET_AVD"; then echo "Tablet AVD '$TABLET_AVD' not found. Set TABLET_AVD to an installed AVD name."; exit 1; fi; ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/emulator/emulator -avd "$TABLET_AVD" -port 5556 -netdelay none -netspeed full -no-snapshot-load -no-snapshot-save >/tmp/charthub-tablet-emulator.log 2>&1 &

configurations.name: Android: Install To Emulator (emulator-5554)
configurations.command: if ! ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb devices | grep -q '^emulator-5554\s'; then ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/emulator/emulator -avd Medium_Phone_API_36.1 -netdelay none -netspeed full -no-snapshot-load -no-snapshot-save >/tmp/charthub-emulator.log 2>&1 & fi; ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 wait-for-device; until [ "$(${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\r')" = "1" ]; do sleep 2; done; until ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell cmd package list packages >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done; dotnet build ${workspaceFolder}/ChartHub/ChartHub.csproj -t:Install -p:EnableAndroid=true -f net10.0-android -p:Device=emulator-5554 -p:RuntimeIdentifier=android-x64 -p:EmbedAssembliesIntoApk=true -p:AndroidSdkDirectory=${HOME}/Android/Sdk

configurations.name: Android: Install To Tablet Emulator (emulator-5556)
configurations.command: TABLET_AVD=${TABLET_AVD:-Medium_Tablet_API_36.1}; if ! ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb devices | grep -q '^emulator-5556\s'; then if ! ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/emulator/emulator -list-avds | grep -qx "$TABLET_AVD"; then echo "Tablet AVD '$TABLET_AVD' not found. Set TABLET_AVD to an installed AVD name."; exit 1; fi; ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/emulator/emulator -avd "$TABLET_AVD" -port 5556 -netdelay none -netspeed full -no-snapshot-load -no-snapshot-save >/tmp/charthub-tablet-emulator.log 2>&1 & fi; ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5556 wait-for-device; until [ "$(${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5556 shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\r')" = "1" ]; do sleep 2; done; until ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5556 shell cmd package list packages >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done; dotnet build ${workspaceFolder}/ChartHub/ChartHub.csproj -t:Install -p:EnableAndroid=true -f net10.0-android -p:Device=emulator-5556 -p:RuntimeIdentifier=android-x64 -p:EmbedAssembliesIntoApk=true -p:AndroidSdkDirectory=${HOME}/Android/Sdk
